Plugin.Name: AgentArtifactMemoryPlugin
Plugin.Title: Artifact Memory Reader
Plugin.Description: Loads persisted artifact memories by canonical artifact URI.

Projection.SummaryTemplate:
{% for e in evidence %}- evidenceUri: {{ e.evidenceUri }} {{ e.slots.status }} {{ e.slots.artifactUri }} (loaded={{ e.slots.memoryCount }} unavailable={{ e.slots.unavailableRefCount }} oversized={{ e.slots.oversizedRefCount }} failed={{ e.slots.failedRefCount }})
{% endfor %}

Summary.Template:
{% for block in projections %}{{ block.summary }}
{% endfor %}

Search.Summary: 按 artifactUri 读取已经落地的 artifact 记忆和证据投影。

Capabilities.Title: Artifact memory read
Capabilities.Description: Load persisted artifact projections or evidence records by canonical artifact URI.

UseCases: 历史工具结果、网页搜索结果、artifact projection、evidence 结构化读取。
Avoid: artifactUri 缺失时先使用当前上下文或检索工具定位证据引用。
只需要轻量 facts 就能回答时不要读取完整 artifact。
